name: Hummus
recipeIngredient: 1/3 c Lemon Juice or To Taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients, except garnishes, in blender or food processor container.
2. Blend to a smooth, creamy paste.
3. Taste and add more lemon juice or salt to suit your taste. It should be the creamy consistency of mashed potatoes.
4. Thin with chickpea liquid or water if necessary.
5. Scrape into an attractive bowl.
6. Drizzle olive oil over the surface in a decorative pattern and sprinkle with parsley.
7. Serve with wedges of pita bread and raw vegetables.
